<div data-cms-block="marketplace-core/gallery" data-attrs="eyJpbWFnZXMiOlt7InVybCI6IjA0LXN0b3JlZnJvbnQuanBnIiwiYWx0IjoiU3RvcmVmcm9udCJ9XX0="></div>

## Description

Storefront treats every post as a product. The bundled `/catalog.html` page auto-aggregates all product posts and ships with client-side filters (by category, by tag, by price tier) — no backend, no API calls, just a single JSON file generated at publish.

A home bento layout, a trending products widget, a journal section, and a category row are all editable via the **Theme settings** tabs. Each product carries its own price, button label, and per-product config.
